articles.title: ‘I am a Raider’: Maxx Crosby breaks silence after Ravens trade falls through
articles.description:
Everything happens for a reason, Crosby said.

The post ‘I am a Raider’: Maxx Crosby breaks silence after Ravens trade falls through appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maxx Crosby confirms commitment to the Raiders after failed trade with the Ravens.
Crosby stated, 'Everything happens for a reason,' reflecting on the situation.
Boston fans may see Crosby remain a key player in upcoming games.

articles.title: She’s running Boston to honor her grandmother, support cancer patients
articles.description:
"Boston is home, and I know Gamma would have been thrilled to stand along the course and cheer me on."

The post She’s running Boston to honor her grandmother, support cancer patients appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Laura Davis is running the Boston Marathon to honor her late grandmother.
She aims to raise funds for cancer patients through her participation.
The event fosters community support for cancer awareness in Boston.

articles.title: Carjacking suspect shot and killed in Roxbury, police say
articles.description:
Officers fired at a suspect after he accelerated a stolen vehicle towards them, Boston Police Commissioner Michael Cox said.

The post Carjacking suspect shot and killed in Roxbury, police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Officers shot a carjacking suspect in Roxbury on March 12, 2026.
The suspect accelerated a stolen vehicle towards police, prompting the response.
Boston Police Commissioner Michael Cox confirmed the incident's impact on community safety.

articles.title: Colin Dorgan, who lost 3 family members in Pawtucket shooting, scores game-winning goal
articles.description:
"Greatest moment of my life."

The post Colin Dorgan, who lost 3 family members in Pawtucket shooting, scores game-winning goal appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Colin Dorgan scored the game-winning goal in a recent match, marking a personal triumph.
Dorgan lost three family members in the Pawtucket shooting, highlighting community tragedy.
His achievement brings hope and resilience to Boston residents affected by violence.
